name: magi
description: Multi-perspective analysis system for Codex. Spawns three analytical perspectives (Melchior, Balthasar, Caspar) for code, design, and decision review, then synthesizes a consensus verdict.

interface.shortDescription: Three-perspective review and consensus for Codex.
interface.longDescription: MAGI runs a structured multi-perspective analysis with Melchior for technical rigor, Balthasar for pragmatic maintainability, and Caspar for risks and failure modes. It is intended for non-trivial code reviews, design decisions, trade-offs, and decisions where disagreement is useful.
defaultPrompt: Give me three perspectives on this design
